name: Generic Research Book
page_format: A4 or US letter, depending on the book production target
formatting_rules: Treat the generated section plan as chapter-level structure by default.
Allow references in a shared bibliography file named paper.bib.
Preserve explicit TODO placeholders for missing support until the book content is complete.
review_warnings: Book chapters can be longer and more explanatory than conference sections.
Do not collapse chapter-level exposition into conference-paper density.
